projects.name: ClaudioOS
projects.handoff_excerpt: RTL8168 wired-ethernet driver runs on real HW. Link up at 1000M, TX works, RX blocked. DHCP times out because chip fires zero RX interrupts. Likely needs chip-variant-specific init (Linux r8169-style CPlusCmd + Config regs).
blockers: No PHY init (relying on BIOS leftover state — link=UP so not hard-blocking)
RTL8168 RX path: zero interrupts, no frames delivered

projects.name: Wraith Browser
projects.handoff_excerpt: Massive session 2026-03-31 to 2026-04-02. Fixed Indeed scraping (2 bugs), built ClaudioOS bare-metal port (3 new no_std crates, ~3,400 lines), HttpTransport trait + sevro-headless, head-to-head benchmarks vs Playwright, enterprise site polish.
milestones_hit: ClaudioOS bare-metal port shipped (3 no_std crates)

projects.name: Kalshi Trader v7 (Pixie Dust)
projects.handoff_excerpt: No HANDOFF.md present. Active development on llm-proposer crate: prompt caching, 429 backoff, OAuth header fixes, A/B harness, scoping confidence to active model tier. Shipped llm-proposer 0.3.0 — shells out to `claude --print`, unlocks Opus 4.7.

projects.name: Job Hunter MCP
projects.handoff_excerpt: Last updated 2026-04-11 SESSION 2 END — Orchestrator live, 30min poll + 2h scrape, sniper mode. Open thread: Priyasha S. client call status (Matt was scheduling manually at session end).
milestones_hit: Orchestrator live (30min poll + 2h scrape, sniper mode)

projects.name: The Right Wire
projects.handoff_excerpt: Wire Intelligence ($19.99/mo) is now a real product, not a teaser. Five-module Ops Room live at /intel. War Room enriched with three new layers (econ shocks, conflict zones, intel-context sidebar, ECON-tagged ticker). Claude.ai-cookie sidecar active.
milestones_hit: Wire Intelligence Ops Room shipped — Economy + Policy + Election + Conflicts

projects.name: PerformanceTracker
projects.handoff_excerpt: PHASE 1 BUILDS ON SIMULATOR — TESTS AWAITING iMac POWER-CYCLE. PDFs converted to clean markdown. CLAUDE.md trimmed to 7.7K. Phase 1 Swift scaffold deployed to iMac, BUILD SUCCEEDED on iOS Simulator (iPhone 17 Pro, iOS 17+, Swift 6 strict).
blockers: iMac thermal crash mid-test-run; needs physical power cycle (OCLP/Haswell under heavy compile load)
